title: Coby Chooses His Own Path
description: On pages 21–21, this part moves through Shells Town and the first clues about Zoro, Morgan, and Helmeppo’s abuse of power.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: 4. Draw two lines across the lower circle.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: 5. Draw three vertical lines along the horizontal lines.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: 9. And if you draw a straw hat on it, you get Luffy's flag!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: 7. And you're finished! What!? Wait a minute...

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
